scripts.test:e2e: cd packages/app && npx playwright test && cd ../web && npx playwright test
scripts.start: cd packages/app && echo '=== DEBUG: Environment Variables ===' && env | grep -E '(DATABASE|DIRECT)' && echo '=== DEBUG: Prisma Config ===' && cat prisma.config.ts && echo '=== DEBUG: Schema Directory ===' && ls -la prisma/ && echo '=== DEBUG: Running Prisma ===' && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && next start
